sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tu-in kum thak hong tung ta, Topa nong piaksa hi;
Sep ding bawl ding kum hi a, Nang tawh sep
Mainawtna ding kum hi a, Kong phat ding kum a hi;
Nisim a nong ompihna, Theih telna

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hehpihna kum thak hi a, Cihtak na’ng kum zong hi;
kum hi a, Lung damna’ng kum thak hi,
Nong hehpihna ang-sung a, Kong ki ap kum a hi;
tawl dam hit-hiat a, Kong muan na’ng kumthak hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nong itna thu gen khia a, Nasep
Nasep siangtho sem ding a, Kipattah kum a hi;
Tu-in kum thak hong tung ta,
Leitung leh vantung teng a, Na minthan ding kum hi.
